key_highlights: Global tech sell-off intensifies, led by AI and chip stocks, with Micron's results reviving some AI bets but memory stocks remain under pressure.
Oil prices slump below $75 for the first time since March as Hormuz Strait traffic recovers, erasing wartime gains.
SpaceX valuation rebounds above $2 trillion after dodging danger zone, but stock later tumbles 23% from high.
Accenture acquires cybersecurity assets for $4.175B, signaling strong M&A in tech services.
Japan's 20-year bond sale sees lowest demand since May 2025 rout, raising fresh JGB concerns amid $2.3 trillion investment plan.
Alan Greenspan, former Fed chair, dies at 100, marking end of an era in central banking.
House passes sweeping bill to lower housing costs, sending it to Trump's desk.
Dollar climbs to 13-month high on Fed hike bets and safe-haven demand.
Bitcoin's $10 billion options expiry risks deepening selloff.
Copper climbs as lower dollar and AI rally counter rate concerns.

sectors.trend: Sharp sell-off with selective revival. AI and chip stocks lead declines globally, but Micron's results and SK Hynix's US listing plans provide some optimism. Memory stocks remain under pressure, with DRAM ETF hit. Meta doubles down on wearables with $299 glasses. IBM scales quantum computing. SpaceX valuation volatile.
sectors.implications: Investors should differentiate between AI infrastructure plays (Nokia, Applied Digital) and overvalued AI hype stocks. Quantum computing (IBM, Trump fast-track) and cybersecurity (Accenture, Zscaler) offer long-term growth. Memory sector faces cyclical downturn.

sectors.trend: Oil prices collapse below $75 as Hormuz Strait traffic recovers, erasing wartime gains. Brent crude falls below $73. Mideast oil revival accelerates with Qatar selling crude to Asia. Natural gas falls on cooler US temps. Chevron secures 20-year data center power deal with Microsoft.
sectors.implications: Oil supply glut and geopolitical de-escalation pressure prices. Energy stocks may underperform near-term. Chevron's data center deal highlights energy demand from AI infrastructure. Renewable/nuclear energy loans ($17.5B) signal long-term shift.

sectors.trend: Dollar hits 13-month high on Fed hike bets and safe-haven demand. BOJ hawkish member calls for rate hikes every few months. PBOC signals policy shift with overnight reverse repo plans. Japan's JGB auction sees weak demand. Gold slips below $4,000/oz.
sectors.implications: Strong dollar pressures emerging markets and commodities. BOJ tightening could trigger yen carry trade unwind. PBOC easing supports Chinese assets. Gold's decline suggests risk-off sentiment is not extreme.

sectors.trend: Summer sales events kick off as inflation squeezes US consumers. H&M profit misses estimates. Domino's bets on new CEO. Yum! Brands under scrutiny. Coke, Pepsi, Dr Pepper adopt QR codes for ingredients.
sectors.implications: Consumer spending remains pressured by inflation, but discount-driven demand may benefit value retailers. Fast-food chains face margin compression. QR codes signal digital transformation in CPG.

sectors.trend: AbbVie's $10.9B deal sparks 46% rally in Apogee. FDA approves TRYNGOLZA for severe hypertriglyceridemia. Alnylam forms $2B partnership with Inceptive. Biotech Kiniksa pushes toward buy zone. Cal-Maine settles DOJ egg pricing probe.
sectors.implications: M&A activity in biotech remains robust. FDA approvals create catalysts. Egg pricing settlement may pressure food stocks. Healthcare offers defensive growth amid tech volatility.

sectors.trend: House passes sweeping bill to lower housing costs. Australia's housing slump wipes $128B off top two markets. City sidewalk/curb projects signal infrastructure spending.
sectors.implications: US housing bill could boost homebuilder stocks and affordable housing REITs. Australian housing downturn may spread to other markets. Infrastructure spending supports construction materials.

sectors.trend: Copper climbs on lower dollar and AI rally. Palm oil posts biggest drop in a month. Gold slips below $4,000/oz. Nat-gas falls on cooler temps.
sectors.implications: Copper benefits from AI data center demand and weak dollar. Oil and palm oil decline on supply recovery. Gold's pullback may be temporary if recession fears rise.

key_themes: AI and tech sell-off with selective revival (Micron, SK Hynix)
Oil price collapse on Hormuz reopening and supply glut
Strong dollar and global monetary policy divergence (Fed hawkish, BOJ tightening, PBOC easing)
M&A wave in cybersecurity (Accenture), biotech (AbbVie, Alnylam), and data centers (Applied Digital)
SpaceX valuation volatility and retail investor losses
Japan JGB market stress amid $2.3T investment plan
US housing affordability bill and Australian housing slump
Bitcoin options expiry risk and crypto selloff
Geopolitical risks: Venezuela earthquakes, India floods, Nigeria IPO frenzy

risk_assessment.mitigation: Rotate to value/defensive sectors, focus on AI infrastructure with real earnings (Nokia, Applied Digital), avoid overvalued AI hype stocks.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Oil price collapse and energy sector stress
risk_assessment.mitigation: Reduce exposure to oil producers, consider long-term energy transition plays (nuclear, renewables), hedge with Chevron's data center contracts.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Strong dollar and emerging market debt
risk_assessment.mitigation: Diversify currency exposure, favor US assets, avoid EM debt with high dollar sensitivity. Monitor BOJ and PBOC policy shifts.
Reduce exposure to Japanese government bonds and yen-denominated assets. Monitor BOJ rate hike pace and auction demand.
Avoid leveraged crypto positions. $10B options expiry could amplify volatility. Consider hedging with put options or reducing exposure.
Monitor Venezuela earthquakes impact on oil infrastructure, India floods on supply chains. Maintain diversified portfolio with safe-haven assets.
Watch Alibaba lawsuit vs US government, Google YouTube settlement, and egg pricing probe. Avoid stocks with high litigation exposure.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy AI infrastructure plays with real earnings (Nokia, Applied Digital, Chevron data center deals)
opportunities.rationale: AI data center demand is real and growing. Nokia offers attractive valuation, Applied Digital expands capacity, Chevron secures long-term power contracts.

opportunities.recommendation: Invest in cybersecurity M&A targets (Accenture, Zscaler, Varonis)
opportunities.rationale: Accenture's $4.175B cybersecurity acquisition signals sector consolidation. Zscaler expands AI security. Varonis sale rumors indicate premium potential.

opportunities.recommendation: Accumulate biotech with near-term catalysts (Alnylam, Kiniksa, AbbVie deal beneficiaries)
opportunities.rationale: FDA approvals and M&A provide upside. Alnylam's $2B partnership, Kiniksa's blockbuster potential, AbbVie's Apogee deal create momentum.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy copper and infrastructure plays on AI and housing demand (copper miners, homebuilders)
opportunities.rationale: Copper climbs on AI rally and lower dollar. US housing bill boosts homebuilders. Infrastructure spending supports materials.

opportunities.recommendation: Consider low volatility ETFs during tech rout (e.g., USMV, SPLV)
opportunities.rationale: Tech sell-off creates opportunity for defensive rotation. Low vol ETFs provide downside protection while maintaining equity exposure.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Reduce exposure to overvalued AI and chip stocks, especially memory (DRAM ETF, AMD, NVDA)
defensive_moves.rationale: Memory rout and tech sell-off indicate overvaluation. Micron's revival may be temporary. Rotate to value or infrastructure.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Hedge oil price exposure with short positions or put options on energy ETFs
defensive_moves.rationale: Oil collapse below $75 likely to continue as Hormuz supply recovers. Energy sector faces headwinds from glut and weak demand.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Increase cash or short-term Treasuries amid dollar strength and Fed hike bets
defensive_moves.rationale: Dollar at 13-month high and Fed tightening favor cash. Short-term Treasuries offer yield with low duration risk.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Avoid Japanese government bonds and yen-denominated assets
defensive_moves.rationale: JGB auction demand weakens, BOJ hawkish stance, and $2.3T investment plan raise concerns. Yen may weaken further.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Reduce exposure to consumer discretionary stocks with high inflation sensitivity
defensive_moves.rationale: Summer sales events indicate consumer squeeze. H&M profit miss, Domino's CEO change, Yum! Brands criticism signal weakness.

market_outlook.short_term: 1-3 month outlook: Markets remain volatile with tech sell-off and oil collapse dominating. The dollar's strength and Fed hike expectations will pressure risk assets. However, AI infrastructure and cybersecurity M&A provide selective opportunities. Bitcoin options expiry could trigger further crypto weakness. Geopolitical risks (Venezuela earthquakes, India floods) add uncertainty. Expect continued rotation from growth to value and defensive sectors.
market_outlook.long_term: 6-12 month outlook: AI and quantum computing remain secular growth themes, but valuations need to correct. Oil prices may stabilize around $70-80 as supply adjusts. The housing bill and infrastructure spending support construction. Biotech M&A and FDA approvals drive healthcare gains. Japan's JGB market and BOJ policy are key risks. Global monetary policy divergence (Fed hawkish, PBOC easing) will shape currency and capital flows. Long-term investors should focus on AI infrastructure, cybersecurity, and biotech.
key_catalysts: Micron earnings and memory sector outlook
Oil supply recovery from Hormuz and OPEC+ response
Fed rate decision and dot plot in July
BOJ rate hike pace and JGB auction demand
US housing bill implementation and impact on homebuilders
Venezuela earthquake impact on oil infrastructure
Alibaba lawsuit vs US government outcome
AbbVie-Apogee deal closing and biotech M&A wave
watch_list: Brent crude oil price and Hormuz Strait traffic
US Dollar Index (DXY) and Fed rhetoric
Japan 20-year JGB yield and auction demand
Bitcoin price and options open interest
AI and semiconductor ETF flows (SMH, SOXX)
Venezuela oil production and earthquake damage
India monsoon and flood impact on agriculture
Nigeria Dangote IPO demand and Africa capital flows
SpaceX stock price and retail investor sentiment
US housing starts and homebuilder stocks
BOJ meeting minutes and rate hike signals
